title: Songs that sound better than their lyrics
markdown:
[What Is Love](http://www.lyricsondemand.com/onehitwonders/whatislovelyrics.html), Haddaway.  [Love Song](http://www.lyrics007.com/The%20Cure%20Lyrics/Lovesong%20Lyrics.html), by the cure is pretty unreadable but sounds good.  [Friday I’m in Love](http://www.paradise-engineering.com/quotation/fridayiminlove.html), the Cure again, is entirely readable.


If love impairs the ability to write readable lyrics, than we can infer Friday I’m in Love in insincere.
